brief_justification: Paper A is a PDE-analysis result on ultradifferentiable/Gevrey regularity of solutions to Hormander-type hypoelliptic differential operators, whereas paper B is a domain-decomposition algorithm (overlapping blocks, circumsphere-filtered Delaunay tessellations, boundary stitching) for scaling the DisPerSE topological filament finder to gigaparsec cosmological volumes; there is no shared governing equation, transition, or estimation structure, so no role-for-role mapping holds.
